notice: 1.3.8 makes the HAP push much faster on big projects: updating a space now jumps straight to it by name instead of scrolling the list row by row.
notes: 1.3.8 - faster HAP push, especially for large projects. When updating an existing space, the app now jumps STRAIGHT to it by name, instead of stepping down the Spaces list one row at a time (which got slow for spaces far down a long list - e.g. space #200 took ~20s just to reach). Reaching any space is now near-instant. Plus a small safe per-space speed trim. Just click Update now.
